markdown:
**Adam β₂ = 0.98** in the Transformer paper.

From Section 5.3 (Optimizer) of *Attention Is All You Need*:

> We used the Adam optimizer [20] with β₁ = 0.9, β₂ = 0.98 and ϵ = 10⁻⁹. [1]

Sources
[1] Attention Is All You Need, 5.3 Optimizer, p. 7
